meaning: adj.<美俚>古怪的,乖僻的,疯疯癫癫的
examples: As if just riding a unicycle didn't look funny enough, add mallets and balls and you've got a truly wacky spectacle.
Some of his friends are pretty wild and wacky characters.
Always sign with your (entire) real name, not some wacky nickname like Ry-Ry or Biff.
You can find a statistic or study to support nearly every wacky theory out there.
Reading about another wacky corporate payout is not something I can ever get anesthetized to.
